title: Reported speech (past) — tense backshift
objectives: Report past speech with the right tense shifts
grammar_notes: When the reporting verb is in the PAST (dijo, preguntó), shift tenses one step into the past:
Russian doesn't shift tenses in reported speech — directly maps 'Он сказал, что хочет' (still present 'хочет'). Spanish DOES shift. This is one of the trickiest gaps for Russian speakers.
example_phrases: Ana dijo que tenía hambre. ("Tengo hambre")
Me dijo que había ido al médico. ("Fui al médico")
